data.title: ISG to study providers aiding enterprises in building AI-ready infrastructure. Focus on AI training, inference, and scale.
data.description: A new study has been initiated by ISG to analyze providers aiding businesses in establishing AI-capable infrastructure for AI training, inference, and deployment on a large scale. This study will assess key players in the industry and their offerings to support enterprises in implementing AI technologies effectively.

data.title: CrowdStrike receives Frost & Sullivan's Company of the Year award for Cloud Workload Security and Global SaaS Security Posture Management for the second time. Leader in cloud security.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) has been honored as Frost & Sullivan's Company of the Year for Cloud Workload Security in 2026. This recognition comes after being named the 2025 Company of the Year for Global SaaS Security Posture Management for the second year in a row. These achievements highlight CrowdStrike's dominance in cloud runtime security for cloud workloads, SaaS environments, and AI, all integrated into a cohesive platform. This acknowledgment underscores CrowdStrike's expertise as AI continues to drive cloud adoption.

data.title: Midwest FiberPath plans 1,200-mile multi-conduit platform in the Central US for AI traffic; aims to enhance carrier mesh diversity.
data.description: Midwest FiberPath, LLC unveiled their new project in Cedar Rapids, Iowa on February 17, 2026. The company revealed their strategy for a long-haul infrastructure platform spanning 1,200 miles. This multi-conduit backbone is specifically designed to accommodate AI traffic flowing in both east-west and north-south directions. In addition, the platform aims to enhance carrier mesh diversity for future applications.

data.title: Sean Hannity to launch "Hang Out with Sean Hannity" podcast in March, featuring long-form interviews. Expanding media footprint.
data.description: In March 2026, a new podcast called "Hang Out with Sean Hannity" will be introduced, offering long-form interviews with prominent figures. The podcast is part of FOX News Channel, and will be hosted by Sean Hannity who aims to broaden his media presence through this new venture. The launch is set to take place in the upcoming month, as announced on February 17, 2026. This initiative showcases Hannity's endeavor to engage audiences in a different format and provide in-depth conversations with influential voices within the media industry.

data.title: Hydrogen combustion engine market to reach USD 20.8B by 2036 at 28.5% CAGR due to policy and infrastructure changes.
data.description: Policy clarity and advancements in infrastructure are steering fleets towards utilizing hydrogen internal combustion engines (H2-ICE) as a viable third option in addition to battery-electric and fuel cells. data.title: Union Home Mortgage appoints Renee Hildebrand as National VP of Mergers & Acquisitions, with 25+ yrs in the industry.
data.description: With more than 25 years of expertise in the mortgage sector, Renee Hildebrand joins Union Home Mortgage (UHM) in Strongsville, Ohio. The high-growth independent mortgage banking firm, known for its exceptional culture, disclosed the hiring of Renee on February 17, 2026.

data.title: AI energy boom: Trump's plan to quadruple nuclear capacity meets prediction of AI data center consumption doubling by 2026.
data.description: Eagle Energy Metals Corp announced from Vancouver, BC on Feb 17, 2026, that President Trump's directive to increase nuclear capacity by four times is facing a challenge as projections suggest that AI data center consumption may double by 2026. This clash comes at a time of growing energy demands, with nuclear energy production set to experience a significant surge alongside the rapid expansion of AI technologies.

data.title: TOPDON USA sales soared by 70% in 2025, positioning them as an industry leader in diagnostic technology with innovative tools.
data.description: TOPDON USA, a leading provider of diagnostic tools for automotive professionals and DIYers, saw a significant sales increase of 70% in 2025 compared to 2024 in the U.S. market. The company launched multiple new products including ArtiDiag EU, RLink J2534, TP58, V3000, UltraDiag Moto, V1200Air, ArtiDiag HD, TS004 Pro, and BT600Plus. They also invested in non-profit and auto education programs nationwide. Vice President Chad Schnitz highlighted the company's success in offering advanced technology at competitive prices, becoming a trusted brand in just nine years since entering the U.S. market in 2017. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: EToro (NASDAQ: ETOR) stock surges after Q4 earnings report with $.71 EPS and $3.88B revenue. Net contribution was $227M.
data.description: EToro Group Ltd. (NASDAQ: ETOR) shares have seen an increase in trading on Tuesday following the release of their fourth-quarter financial results. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of 71 cents and revenue of approximately $3.88 billion for the quarter. This strong performance has led to a surge in their stock price, making EToro one of the top performers of the day. The CFO of EToro, Meron Shani, stated that the fourth-quarter results highlight the robustness of their multi-asset business model. Additionally, the company reported a net contribution of $227 million in the fourth quarter. This information has caused shares to jump, as investors react positively to the company's financial report.

data.title: O'Leary Digital partners with West GenCo to develop 7.5 GW Wonder Valley Utah Campus; 26,000 acres, 15 GW plan, permits underway.
data.description: A strategic joint venture has been formed by O'Leary Digital Limited and West GenCo LLC to advance the development of Wonder Valley Utah. This venture will cover 26,000 acres across two jurisdictions and support an initial power plan of 15 gigawatts. The announcement was made on Feb. 17, 2026, in Miami.

data.title: Global air purifier market projected to exceed USD 29.09 billion by 2032 due to urbanization, industrial pollution, and health-conscious consumer trends.
data.description: In Pune, India, on February 17, 2026, Maximize Market Research released a report on the Air Purifier Market Global Outlook for the period 2024-2032. The report highlights a significant increase in the adoption of air purification technologies globally, driven by factors such as rising urbanization, industrial pollution, and a growing health-conscious consumer base. This trend is expected to continue shaping the market landscape in the coming years.

data.title: Adani Group plans $100B for renewable-powered AI data centres by 2035, expected to generate $250B AI ecosystem.
data.description: A widely diversified conglomerate has revealed plans to funnel a substantial $100 billion into renewable-powered Artificial Intelligence (AI) data centre infrastructure by the year 2035. This significant investment announcement is predicted to spur an additional $150 billion in related investments, fostering the growth of a projected $250 billion AI ecosystem. The conglomerate's expansion strategy...

data.description: Questco, a leading Professional Employer Organization (PEO) catering to small and mid-sized businesses, based in The Woodlands, Texas, made significant executive appointments on Feb. 17, 2026. This move aims to bolster the company's rapid expansion. Notably, Kimberly Diorio was appointed...

data.title: Safire Technology Group launches SafireAI, offering Edge AI for Enterprise Energy Intelligence.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Safire Technology Group, Inc (Safire Group) unveiled the establishment of SafireAI division, concentrating on enterprise energy intelligence for contemporary electrified operations. SafireAI introduces an infrastructure-grade platform incorporating Safire Group's exclusive Domain-Specific LLM directly into the energy operating layer. This empowers real-time, energy-conscious decision-making for intricate electrified operations. The initiative targets assisting enterprises as they introduce fleets of electrified assets, with a focus on optimizing energy efficiency during operations.

data.title: Billionaire Sam Bankman-Fried criticizes Dems for censoring info; pivots towards Truth Social & GETTR, disliking Dems censoring true info.
data.description: Sam Bankman-Fried criticized Democrats for censoring "misinformation" on social media and endorsed Truth Social and GETTR as platforms that prioritize free speech. This marks a notable shift from his previous support, having donated $5.2 million to the Biden campaign in 2020. In a post on X, Bankman-Fried argued that Democrats use misinformation policies to silence information they disagree with, highlighting instances such as the lab leak theory and mask mandates being censored. He stated that Truth Social and GETTR have always prioritized free speech, contrasting them with mainstream social media platforms. Bankman-Fried's public stance signals a significant alignment with right-wing messaging, a departure from previous positions. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: DBMS market grows at 5.5% CAGR due to cloud, big data, and digital transformation. Rising data fuels demand for secure storage.
data.description: The growth of data generated across enterprises, driven by technologies like cloud computing, IoT, AI, and advanced analytics, is the primary driver of the Database Management System (DBMS) market. Organizations are increasingly turning to DBMS solutions for secure data storage and real-time access. As a result of this trend, the DBMS market is experiencing significant growth, with global revenue reaching (specific number) and expected to continue rising in the coming years.

data.title: InventHelp inventor from South Holland, Ill., creates new two-seater vehicle kit (CHK-4037) with SPEED TONNEAU SYSTEM.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 17, 2026, an inventor from South Holland, Illinois, introduced a new vehicle kit called the SPEED TONNEAU SYSTEM. The kit aims to conceal the two rarely used rear seats when the convertible top is open. The inventor stated that the design allows for a neat solution for this, providing easier usability while maintaining functionality.

data.title: Global Space Robotics Market on strong growth trajectory due to rising investments in autonomous mission systems and AI-enabled robotics, backed by expanding space activities.
data.description: The Space Robotics Market worldwide is witnessing steady growth, fueled by increasing investments in autonomous mission systems and the rapid progress in AI-enabled robotics technology. Both commercial and governmental space activities are expanding, further driving the market. Demand is particularly strong due to requirements for satellite servicing.
